# ALPINNO GmbH

> ALPINNO is a Swiss consulting and technology company helping innovation-led organisations use AI, data, automation and agile methods to create and execute valuable, protectable innovation.

Canonical website: https://alpinno-solutions.ch/

## Core offerings

- AI transformation, implementation, governance, training, coaching and capability building
- AI-assisted, data-driven innovation, invention development and intellectual-property support
- Agile execution, new-product development, project and programme management, PMO and portfolio governance
- AIdea, ALPINNO's proprietary AI-assisted, data-driven innovation and invention platform

## AIdea

AIdea guides expert teams through a structured, flexible and iterative workflow. It connects corporate knowledge, AIdea-curated knowledge and public intelligence to evidence-grounded opportunities, ideas, concepts, inventions and invention disclosures.

AIdea is used in ALPINNO-led projects and may also be deployed through secure cloud, customer-hosted or dedicated local arrangements with tailored setup, training and support.

## Important context

- AIdea is human-led and AI-assisted. Human experts define, select, refine and approve inventive contributions.
- Preliminary patentability and freedom-to-operate screening is early technical support, not a formal legal opinion.
- Inventorship and patentability depend on the applicable jurisdiction and the facts of each invention.
- Performance statements on the website are founder-observed results and are identified as such.

## Automated access

Public search and AI crawlers, including AI-search and model-training crawlers, may access the public website under robots.txt.
